description: Default reasoning policy for Layer 4 agentic workflows that produce user-facing value narratives or recommendations.
evidence_requirements: Cite at least one provenance-bearing source for factual claims.
Ground ROI, formula, and value-driver claims in Layer 5 truth references when available.
Preserve tenant_id and trace_id across tool calls and workflow steps.
explanation_requirements: Expose low-confidence outputs as review-required rather than final decisions.

compatibility.migration_notes: Initial policy. Threshold or escalation changes require prompt/policy changelog evidence.

governance.review_requirement: Contract Council review for thresholds, evidence requirements, or escalation changes.
governance.approval_threshold: Two reviewers representing Layer 4 and Platform/Security.
governance.rollout_policy: Feature-flagged rollout for enforcement changes; CI starts in warning mode.
governance.deprecation_policy: Maintain previous policy version until dependent prompts are migrated.
